description: Master document for a coordinated DeFi relief campaign. One per campaign drive.
name: ReliefCampaign

modules.description: Lifecycle and registry operations for a relief campaign
modules.name: management

operations.name: SET_CAMPAIGN_DETAILS
operations.schema:
input AffectedAssetInput {
    symbol: String!
    address: EthereumAddress
    chainId: Int!
}

input SetCampaignDetailsInput {
    name: String
    slug: String
    summary: String
    incidentDate: DateTime
    targetAmount: Amount_Tokens
    affectedAsset: AffectedAssetInput
    riskDisclaimer: String
    contributorRegistryDriveId: PHID
}

operations.description: Register an address that can receive relief contributions

errors.description: A contribution address with the same chain and address is already registered
errors.name: DuplicateContributionAddressError

operations.name: ADD_CONTRIBUTION_ADDRESS
operations.template: Register an address that can receive relief contributions

errors.description: No contribution address exists with the supplied id
errors.name: ContributionAddressNotFoundError

operations.name: REMOVE_CONTRIBUTION_ADDRESS

operations.description: Transition the campaign from DRAFT to ACTIVE

errors.description: Campaign cannot transition into the requested status from its current status
errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionError

errors.description: Campaign slug must be set before starting
errors.name: MissingCampaignSlugError

errors.description: At least one contribution address must be registered before starting
errors.name: MissingContributionAddressError

operations.name: START_CAMPAIGN
operations.template: Transition the campaign from DRAFT to ACTIVE

operations.description: Mark an active or executing campaign as resolved

errors.description: Campaign cannot be resolved from its current status
errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionError

operations.name: MARK_RESOLVED
operations.reducer:
if (state.status !== 'ACTIVE' && state.status !== 'EXECUTING') throw new InvalidStatusTransitionError(`Cannot resolve a campaign in status ${state.status}`);
state.status = 'RESOLVED';
operations.template: Mark an active or executing campaign as resolved

operations.description: Mark a campaign as failed and append a failure note to the summary

errors.description: Campaign cannot be marked failed from its current status
errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionError

operations.name: MARK_FAILED
operations.template: Mark a campaign as failed and append a failure note to the summary

operations.description: Archive a resolved or failed campaign

errors.description: Campaign cannot be archived from its current status
errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionError

operations.name: ARCHIVE_CAMPAIGN
operations.reducer:
if (state.status !== 'RESOLVED' && state.status !== 'FAILED') throw new InvalidStatusTransitionError(`Cannot archive a campaign in status ${state.status}`);
state.status = 'ARCHIVED';
operations.template: Archive a resolved or failed campaign

operations.description: Append a link to external documentation
operations.name: ADD_EXTERNAL_LINK
operations.template: Append a link to external documentation

operations.description: Authorize an address to write via the operations subgraph
operations.name: ADD_OPERATOR_WALLET
operations.template: Authorize an address to write via the operations subgraph

operations.description: Revoke an operator wallet's write authorization

errors.description: Operator wallet is not currently authorized
errors.name: OperatorWalletNotFoundError

operations.name: REMOVE_OPERATOR_WALLET
operations.template: Revoke an operator wallet's write authorization

global.initialValue:
{
  "name": "",
  "slug": "",
  "summary": null,
  "incidentDate": null,
  "status": "DRAFT",
  "targetAmount": null,
  "affectedAsset": null,
  "contributionAddresses": [],
  "riskDisclaimer": null,
  "externalLinks": [],
  "contributorRegistryDriveId": null,
  "operatorWallets": []
}
global.schema:
type ReliefCampaignState {
    name: String!
    slug: String!
    summary: String
    incidentDate: DateTime
    status: CampaignStatus!
    targetAmount: Amount_Tokens
    affectedAsset: AffectedAsset
    contributionAddresses: [ContributionAddress!]!
    riskDisclaimer: String
    externalLinks: [ExternalLink!]!
    contributorRegistryDriveId: PHID
    operatorWallets: [EthereumAddress!]!
}

enum CampaignStatus {
    DRAFT
    ACTIVE
    EXECUTING
    RESOLVED
    FAILED
    ARCHIVED
}

type AffectedAsset {
    symbol: String!
    address: EthereumAddress
    chainId: Int!
}

type ContributionAddress {
    id: OID!
    chainId: Int!
    address: EthereumAddress!
    label: String
}

type ExternalLink {
    id: OID!
    label: String!
    url: URL!
}
